title: leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. ruscinonense
intro: Leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. ruscinonense, also known as Ruscin white daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. ruscinonense include potential uses in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems due to its antioxidant and soothing properties. Leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. ruscinonense is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
